rationale: Both reviews block and surface the same three scope-relevant issues — the prohibited bundling of finiteType/geomReduced, the vacuous IsUnipotent, and the True-stub Reductive/Semisimple classes introduced before their prerequisite layers — all confirmable against the diff; acting on either yields the same outcome (strip the premature Layer 6 material). Review 2's extra GroupLike-vs-points-functor note is a genuine added observation but doesn't change the action, so the resulting PRs are equally good.
